title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions!
